title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
